# seLe4n Handbook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_doc_navigation.py; edit docs/gitbook/navigation_manifest.json -->

This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.

## Current project state
- **Version:** 0.31.9 (Lean v4.28.0).
- **Codebase metrics:** ~131k production LoC across 191 files (incl. NEW SM3.B modules: `SeLe4n/Kernel/Concurrency/Locks/LockSet.lean`, `LockIdProjection.lean`, `LockSetTransitions.lean`, `LockSetInventory.lean`, and the re-export hub `SeLe4n/Kernel/Concurrency/LockSet.lean`); ~26k test LoC across 38 suites (`tests/LockSetSuite.lean` from SM3.B audit-pass-3 with 110+ surface anchors + 95 runtime assertions); 3,865 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom). Rust HAL: 712 host unit tests + 94 ABI conformance tests.
- **Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.
- **Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.31.4 → v0.31.5 → v0.31.6 → v0.31.7 → v0.31.8 → v0.31.9 → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0** (Foundations) COMPLETE at v0.31.3; **SM1** (Rust HAL) CLOSED at v0.31.8 (9 sub-phases, 61 sub-tasks); **SM2.A** (Abstract memory model) LANDED at v0.31.9; **SM2.B** (Verified TicketLock) LANDED post-v0.31.9; **SM2.C** (Verified RwLock + Rust impl, 10 substantive theorems) LANDED post-v0.31.9; **SM2.D** (FFI bridge + integration; 22-theorem aggregator) LANDED post-v0.31.9; **SM2.E** (queued MCS-RW lock + panic-hang remediation) LANDED post-v0.31.9; **SM3.A** (Per-Object Lock Fields) LANDED post-v0.31.9 on branch `claude/tender-gauss-FWPvo` (5 audit passes; 9 of 11 sub-tasks LANDED + SM3.A.5 Reply and SM3.A.8 Page documented as N/A for seLe4n's object model). SM3.A wires SM2.C's abstract `RwLockState` into every kernel-object struct (TCB, Endpoint, CNode, Notification, UntypedObject, SchedContext, VSpaceRoot) with default `RwLockState.unheld`, plus the table-level `SystemState.objStoreLock`, plus the `KernelObject.objectLockOf` / `FrozenKernelObject.objectLockOf` per-variant projections (each with 7 `@[simp]` unfold lemmas), plus the SM3.A.11 default-state theorems (the strengthened audit-pass-5 form `SystemState.allObjectLocksUnheld` is **non-vacuous** — the table-level lock claim is substantive), plus four freeze-preservation witnesses and four storeObject-preservation witnesses, plus consistency theorems pinning the variant count at 7 (locks down the SM3.A.5 Reply / SM3.A.8 Page N/A decisions structurally), plus the 34-entry `perObjectLockTheorems` aggregator (5 categories: 7 fieldDefault + 9 projection + 5 defaultState + 8 preservation + 5 consistency). Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM3 sub-plan: [`SMP_PER_OBJECT_LOCKS_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_PER_OBJECT_LOCKS_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** **SM3.B** (LockSet, LockId projection, per-transition lockSet declarations, canonical sort theorems) LANDED post-SM3.A on branch `claude/affectionate-goldberg-6MNJ9` — all 9 sub-tasks LANDED plus audit-pass-1, audit-pass-2, and audit-pass-3 closures. SM3.B builds the abstract lock-set type (`LockSet` = List with Nodup-keys invariant), per-syscall lock-set declarations (25 `lockSet_<τ>` functions, one per `SyscallId` variant; 4 of which now have donation-path `Option SchedContextId`/`Option ThreadId` extensions per audit-pass-3), the canonical acquisition sort (`lockAcquireSequence` via `List.mergeSort`), three substantive sort theorems (ordered, complete, canonical/uniqueness), 25 per-transition consistency theorems (`lockSet_consistent_<τ>`), the 87-entry `lockSetTheorems` inventory (audit-pass-1+2 expanded from 72) with `lkst!` macro for compile-time identifier validation, the `LockSet.union_mem_inv` structural characterisation theorem (audit-pass-1 spec-gap closure), 4 substantive `lockKind` co-domain theorems (audit-pass-2), and full donation-path lockSet coverage per plan §4.1's 'union over all paths' (audit-pass-3 implements the improvement audit-pass-2 only documented, per CLAUDE.md's `Implement-the-improvement` rule). Next phases: SM3.C (`withLockSet` 2PL discipline), SM3.D/E (deadlock-freedom + serializability) + SM4..SM9 → closure cut at v1.0.0.
- **Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
- **Hardware target:** Raspberry Pi 5 (ARM64).
- **Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
